title: polypodium tricholepis
intro: Polypodium tricholepis, also known as Western polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Polypodium tricholepis can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
